problem: Why is turbulent fluid flow mathematically unpredictable — Navier-Stokes unsolved
mechanism: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power
hypothesis: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power may resolve Why is turbulent fluid flow mathematically unpredictable — Navier-Stokes unsolved by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
